title: Code Summarizer
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a JavaScript function named 'codeSummarizer()' that takes a JSON object containing code metadata as input and outputs a short text summary describing the code's purpose, function, and any notable features.

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated text should adhere to the specified constraints (under 100 words and formal tone)
The generated text should accurately and concisely summarize the provided code metadata
The generated text should maintain a formal tone
